case_title: DEREK SVENSON VS. P & P ENTETINMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA FTB SUSPENDE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SVENSON, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT P & P ENTETINMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA FTB SUSPENDE D CORPORATION DBA NOB HILL LINGERIE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
